introSection: Lipovitan RocketвҳҶLuna (Japanese: гғӘгғқгғ“гӮҝгғігғӯгӮұгғғгғҲвҳҶгғ«гғҠ) is a steel suspended enclosed roller coaster currently located at Yomiuriland in Inagi, Tokyo, Japan.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: White and red track with white and blue supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The cars are equipped with an on-board audio system.

fullText:
Lipovitan RocketвҳҶLuna (Japanese: гғӘгғқгғ“гӮҝгғігғӯгӮұгғғгғҲвҳҶгғ«гғҠ) is a steel suspended enclosed roller coaster currently located at Yomiuriland in Inagi, Tokyo, Japan.



White and red track with white and blue supports.

The cars are equipped with an on-board audio system.


 * Lipovitan RocketвҳҶLuna on the park's website (In Japanese)
